description: Creates an AWS Batch quota share. Each quota share operates as a virtual queue with a configured compute capacity, resource sharing strategy, and borrow limits.

ResourceArn.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[a-z\-]*:batch:[a-z0-9\-]+:[0-9]{12}:job-queue/[a-zA-Z0-9_\-]{1,128}/quota-share/[a-zA-Z0-9_\-]{1,128}$  
Update requires: No interruption

MaxCapacity.description: The maximum capacity available for the quota share. This value represents the maximum quantity of a resource that can be allocated to jobs in the quota share without borrowing.
MaxCapacity.markdownDescription:
The maximum capacity available for the quota share. This value represents the maximum quantity of a resource that can be allocated to jobs in the quota share without borrowing.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

CapacityUnit.description: The unit of compute capacity for the capacityLimit. For example, `ml.m5.large`.
CapacityUnit.markdownDescription:
The unit of compute capacity for the capacityLimit. For example, `ml.m5.large`.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

QuotaShareCapacityLimit.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Strategy.description: The resource sharing strategy for the quota share. The `RESERVE` strategy allows a quota share to reserve idle capacity for itself. `LEND` configures the share to lend its idle capacity to another share in need of capacity. The `LEND_AND_BORROW` strategy configures the share to borrow idle capacity from an underutilized share, as well as lend to another share.
Strategy.markdownDescription:
The resource sharing strategy for the quota share. The `RESERVE` strategy allows a quota share to reserve idle capacity for itself. `LEND` configures the share to lend its idle capacity to another share in need of capacity. The `LEND_AND_BORROW` strategy configures the share to borrow idle capacity from an underutilized share, as well as lend to another share.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: RESERVE | LEND | LEND_AND_BORROW  
Update requires: No interruption

BorrowLimit.description: The maximum percentage of additional capacity that the quota share can borrow from other shares. `BorrowLimit` can only be applied to quota shares with a strategy of `LEND_AND_BORROW`. This value is expressed as a percentage of the quota share's configured CapacityLimits. The `BorrowLimit` is applied uniformly across all capacity units. For example, if the `BorrowLimit` is 200, the quota share can borrow up to 200% of its configured `maxCapacity` for each capacity unit. The default `BorrowLimit` is -1, which indicates unlimited borrowing.
BorrowLimit.markdownDescription:
The maximum percentage of additional capacity that the quota share can borrow from other shares. `BorrowLimit` can only be applied to quota shares with a strategy of `LEND_AND_BORROW`. This value is expressed as a percentage of the quota share's configured CapacityLimits. The `BorrowLimit` is applied uniformly across all capacity units. For example, if the `BorrowLimit` is 200, the quota share can borrow up to 200% of its configured `maxCapacity` for each capacity unit. The default `BorrowLimit` is -1, which indicates unlimited borrowing.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

QuotaShareResourceSharingConfiguration.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

InSharePreemption.description: Specifies whether jobs within a quota share can be preempted by another, higher priority job in the same quota share.
InSharePreemption.markdownDescription:
Specifies whether jobs within a quota share can be preempted by another, higher priority job in the same quota share.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: ENABLED | DISABLED  
Update requires: No interruption

QuotaSharePreemptionConfiguration.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

QuotaShareName.description: The name of the quota share. It can be up to 128 characters long. It can contain uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens (-), and underscores (_).
QuotaShareName.markdownDescription:
The name of the quota share. It can be up to 128 characters long. It can contain uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens (-), and underscores (_).

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: Replacement

QuotaShareArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the quota share.
QuotaShareArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the quota share.

---

Required: No  
Type:   
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

JobQueue.description: The AWS Batch job queue associated with the quota share. This can be the job queue name or ARN. A job queue must be in the `VALID` state before you can associate it with a quota share.
JobQueue.markdownDescription:
The AWS Batch job queue associated with the quota share. This can be the job queue name or ARN. A job queue must be in the `VALID` state before you can associate it with a quota share.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: Replacement

CapacityLimits.description: A list that specifies the quantity and type of compute capacity allocated to the quota share.
CapacityLimits.markdownDescription:
A list that specifies the quantity and type of compute capacity allocated to the quota share.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

ResourceSharingConfiguration.description: Specifies whether a quota share reserves, lends, or both lends and borrows idle compute capacity.
ResourceSharingConfiguration.markdownDescription:
Specifies whether a quota share reserves, lends, or both lends and borrows idle compute capacity.

---

Required: Yes  
Type:   
Update requires: No interruption

PreemptionConfiguration.description: Specifies the preemption behavior for jobs in a quota share.
PreemptionConfiguration.markdownDescription:
Specifies the preemption behavior for jobs in a quota share.

---

Required: Yes  
Type:   
Update requires: No interruption

State.description: The state of the quota share. If the quota share is `ENABLED`, it is able to accept jobs. If the quota share is `DISABLED`, new jobs won't be accepted but jobs already submitted can finish. The default state is `ENABLED`.
State.markdownDescription:
The state of the quota share. If the quota share is `ENABLED`, it is able to accept jobs. If the quota share is `DISABLED`, new jobs won't be accepted but jobs already submitted can finish. The default state is `ENABLED`.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: ENABLED | DISABLED  
Update requires: No interruption

Tags.description: The tags that you apply to the quota share to help you categorize and organize your resources. Each tag consists of a key and an optional value.

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
